clarification_questions: What was the business purpose of this meal? (e.g., client entertainment, employee working meal, team meeting, travel meal, etc.)
Who participated in this meal? (e.g., clients, employees, prospective customers, etc.)

output_debit_classifier.reason: The transaction could map to different expense accounts depending on the business purpose: Meals & Entertainment (50% deductible client meals), Travel Meals (employee travel), Employee Benefits (staff meals), or Office Expenses (working meals). Each classification has different tax treatment and subsequent accounting implications. The business context of the meal is a fact only the person who initiated the transaction would know.
